namespace Python.Generated.Tests;

static partial class TestClassExtensions
{
    private static ITestClass? instance;

    private static ReadOnlySpan<byte> HotReloadHash => "050c4d493ed668491c897a11ca6bd4e7"u8;

    public static ITestClass TestClass(this IPythonEnvironment env)
    {
        if (instance is null)
        {
            instance = new TestClassInternal(env.Logger);
        }
        System.Diagnostics.Debug.Assert(!env.IsDisposed());
        return instance;
    }

    public static void UpdateApplication(Type[]? updatedTypes)
    {
        instance?.ReloadModule();
    }

    private class TestClassInternal : ITestClass
    {
        private PyObject module;
        private readonly ILogger<IPythonEnvironment>? logger;

        private PyObject __func_test_uuid_roundtrip;
        private PyObject __func_test_create_uuid;

        internal TestClassInternal(ILogger<IPythonEnvironment>? logger)
        {
            this.logger = logger;
            using (GIL.Acquire())
            {
                logger?.LogDebug("Importing module {ModuleName}", "test");
                this.module = ThisModule.Import();
                this.__func_test_uuid_roundtrip = module.GetAttr("test_uuid_roundtrip");
                this.__func_test_create_uuid = module.GetAttr("test_create_uuid");
            }
        }

        void IReloadableModuleImport.ReloadModule()
        {
            logger?.LogDebug("Reloading module {ModuleName}", "test");
            using (GIL.Acquire())
            {
                Import.ReloadModule(ref module);
                // Dispose old functions
                this.__func_test_uuid_roundtrip.Dispose();
                this.__func_test_create_uuid.Dispose();
                // Bind to new functions
                this.__func_test_uuid_roundtrip = module.GetAttr("test_uuid_roundtrip");
                this.__func_test_create_uuid = module.GetAttr("test_create_uuid");
            }
        }

        public void Dispose()
        {
            logger?.LogDebug("Disposing module {ModuleName}", "test");
            this.__func_test_uuid_roundtrip.Dispose();
            this.__func_test_create_uuid.Dispose();
            module.Dispose();
        }

        public Guid TestUuidRoundtrip(Guid value)
        {
            using (GIL.Acquire())
            {
                this.logger?.LogDebug("Invoking Python function: {FunctionName}", "test_uuid_roundtrip");
                PyObject __underlyingPythonFunc = this.__func_test_uuid_roundtrip;
                using PyObject value_pyObject = PyObject.From(value)!;
                using PyObject __result_pyObject = __underlyingPythonFunc.Call(value_pyObject);
                var __return = __result_pyObject.BareImportAs<Guid, global::CSnakes.Runtime.Python.PyObjectImporters.Uuid>();
                return __return;
            }
        }

        public Guid TestCreateUuid(string hexStr)
        {
            using (GIL.Acquire())
            {
                this.logger?.LogDebug("Invoking Python function: {FunctionName}", "test_create_uuid");
                PyObject __underlyingPythonFunc = this.__func_test_create_uuid;
                using PyObject hexStr_pyObject = PyObject.From(hexStr)!;
                using PyObject __result_pyObject = __underlyingPythonFunc.Call(hexStr_pyObject);
                var __return = __result_pyObject.BareImportAs<Guid, global::CSnakes.Runtime.Python.PyObjectImporters.Uuid>();
                return __return;
            }
        }
    }
}

/// <summary>
/// Represents functions of the Python module <c>test</c>.
/// </summary>
public interface ITestClass : IReloadableModuleImport
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Invokes the Python function <c>test_uuid_roundtrip</c>:
    /// <code><![CDATA[
    /// def test_uuid_roundtrip(value: uuid.UUID) -> uuid.UUID: ...
    /// ]]></code>
    /// </summary>
    Guid TestUuidRoundtrip(Guid value);

    /// <summary>
    /// Invokes the Python function <c>test_create_uuid</c>:
    /// <code><![CDATA[
    /// def test_create_uuid(hex_str: str) -> uuid.UUID: ...
    /// ]]></code>
    /// </summary>

{
    public static PyObject Import() =>
        CSnakes.Runtime.Python.Import.ImportModule("test");
